source_path: 6. Contact360 Reliability and Scaling/6.4.100 — Docker Go readiness smoke evidence.json
title: 6.4.100 - Docker Go readiness smoke evidence
summary: Docker runtime readiness verification for `s3storage`, `ai`, and `logsapi` services under era `6.4`.
flowcharts:
flowchart LR
  contract[Contract]
  service[Service]
  surface[Surface]
  data[Data]
  ops[Ops]
  gate[Release gate]

  contract --> gate
  service --> gate
  surface --> gate
  data --> gate
  ops --> gate

contract.text: Treat readiness env requirements as release gates in docker profiles (`S3STORAGE_BUCKET`, `HF_API_KEY`).

service.text: Improve readiness responses with explicit remediation hint links for missing env values.

surface.text: Display readiness dependency state in operator panel with direct env key references.

data.text: Add deterministic seed bucket for `s3storage` docker profile to avoid `NoSuchBucket` follow-up errors.

ops.text: Introduce docker smoke stage that fails CI when liveness is green but readiness remains red for missing mandatory envs.

sections.heading: Focus
sections.prose: Docker runtime readiness verification for `s3storage`, `ai`, and `logsapi` services under era `6.4`.
